facebook.caption: POV: you take a wrong turn on Đ. 30 Tháng 4 and end up at Chill Bar Đồi Trăng. 4.8 stars. 157 reviews. You start to understand why. Grab a drink. Sit down. This is the Phu Quoc pace everyone talks about but rarely finds. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walked in not knowing what to expect. Left with a 4.8-star reason to come back. Chill Bar Đồi Trăng on Đ. 30 Tháng 4 is doing something right. 157 reviews agree.

instagram.caption: Took a wrong turn. Found Chill Bar Đồi Trăng. 4.8 stars, 157 reviews, zero regrets. Tag your travel buddy.
